rationale: The citing paper uses Chen, Van der Lans, and Phan (2017) in its core literature positioning, not just as a list citation. It explicitly cites that paper as showing seeding gains from a multinetwork, relationship-characteristics weighting approach, then argues this approach is often hard to apply because required tie-level information is private or costly to obtain. This contrast helps motivate the citing paper's own focus on status-based seeding decisions under limited observable information.
relation_description: The citing paper positions its status-based seeding framework as a practical alternative to the relationship-weighted multinetwork seeding approach in Chen et al. (2017). It accepts Chen et al.'s effectiveness claim but emphasizes feasibility limits of that approach in many real user-generated content settings.
